Legal

Disclaimer

Last updated: June 2026

General Disclaimer

The information provided on interestdecor.com is for general informational and educational purposes only. All content — including blog posts, tutorials, guides, and recommendations — is provided in good faith.

While we make every effort to ensure accuracy, InterestDecor makes no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, reliability, or suitability of any information on this Site. Any reliance you place on such information is strictly at your own risk.

Affiliate Disclosure

InterestDecor is a participant in affiliate marketing programmes including, but not limited to:

  • Amazon Associates Programme
  • Wayfair Affiliate Programme
  • Other craft, home decor, and gardening affiliate programmes

This means that when you click certain links on our Site and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission — at absolutely no extra cost to you. These commissions help us keep InterestDecor running and free for everyone.

Our editorial integrity is never compromised by affiliate relationships. We only recommend products and services we genuinely use, love, or believe will help our readers. We never accept payment to promote products we don't believe in.

DIY & Craft Safety Disclaimer

Many posts on InterestDecor include DIY tutorials, craft projects, and home improvement guides. These activities carry inherent risks.

By following any tutorial or guide on this Site, you acknowledge that:

  • You are solely responsible for your own safety and the safety of those around you
  • You will use appropriate tools, materials, and protective equipment
  • You will follow all manufacturer instructions for tools and materials used
  • Results may vary based on your skill level, materials, and environment

InterestDecor is not liable for any injury, damage, loss, or expense resulting from following our tutorials or advice.

Gardening & Plant Care Disclaimer

Gardening advice on InterestDecor is based on general best practices and personal experience. Plant care requirements vary significantly based on your local climate, soil conditions, water quality, and environment.

We recommend always checking advice with local gardening experts or agricultural extension services for your specific region. InterestDecor is not responsible for plant loss or damage resulting from following our gardening guides.

Results Disclaimer

Any before/after examples, results, or transformations shown on InterestDecor represent individual experiences. Results are not typical and will vary based on skill, effort, materials, and other factors. We make no guarantees about the results you will achieve by following our tutorials or advice.

External Links Disclaimer

InterestDecor may contain links to external websites for reference or affiliate purposes. We have no control over the content, accuracy, or availability of external sites. The inclusion of any link does not imply endorsement of that site or its content.

Professional Advice Disclaimer

Nothing on InterestDecor constitutes professional advice of any kind — including but not limited to legal, financial, structural, or medical advice. For significant home renovations or structural changes, always consult a qualified professional.

Copyright Notice

All original content on InterestDecor — including text, photography, graphics, and designs — is copyright © 2026 InterestDecor. All rights reserved.

You may share links to our content and quote brief excerpts with clear attribution. Reproducing full articles or images without written permission is not permitted. To request permission, please contact us.

Contact

If you have any questions about this Disclaimer, please reach out:

Email: rajamashoodelahi@gmail.com

Website: interestdecor.com/contact/

Your home should feel like you — beautiful, intentional, and full of life. That's what we're here to help create.
